articles.title: BITS Pilani Scientists Convert CO₂ into Clean Cooking Fuel
articles.description: CE speaks to Prof Sounak Roy about BITS Pilani’s breakthrough single-step technology that converts CO₂ into clean cooking fuel, offering a sustainable solution
articles.content: As global tensions continue to disrupt fuel supply chains and India remains dependent on imports for nearly 60 per cent of its LPG needs, the search for a sustainable, homegrown alternative has never been more urgent. Rising to this challenge, scient... [3862 chars]

articles.title: Health insurance platform Plum raises $20 million led by Peak XV
articles.description: Plum has raised $20 million (Rs 193 crore) led by Peak XV Partners, with participation from existing investor Tanglin Venture Partners and new investor GMO Venture Partners. The funds will be used in talent, technology, and AI innovation.
articles.content:
Synopsis
Plum has raised $20 million (Rs 193 crore) led by Peak XV Partners, with participation from existing investor Tanglin Venture Partners and new investor GMO Venture Partners. The funds will be used in talent, technology, and AI innovation.

articles.title: Framework to measure tech health of bourses on the cards
articles.description: The market regulator has proposed an IT Resilience Index (ITRI) to assess the technology robustness of stock exchanges and other market infrastructure. This index will monitor the health of IT systems, with availability and security carrying the highest weightages. The framework aims to provide clearer insights into vulnerabilities and enable inter-institutional comparisons.
articles.content:
Synopsis
The market regulator has proposed an IT Resilience Index (ITRI) to assess the technology robustness of stock exchanges and other market infrastructure. This index will monitor the health of IT systems, with availability and security carrying... [383 chars]

articles.title: 2 Millionaire-Maker Technology Stocks
articles.description: These two TSX tech stocks have solid underlying fundamentals, a solid demand, and the ability to outperform the rest of the market.
articles.content: Investors looking to outperform the market over the next few years should focus on looking what is beyond all the noise in global markets these days. I am not saying you should ignore the impact that the geopolitical crises can have on your investmen... [2576 chars]

articles.title: IndustrialMind.ai Announces AI Deployment at ANDRITZ to Augment Engineering Capabilities for Hydraulic Equipment Parts
articles.description: SAN FRANCISCO, March 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- ANDRITZ, a global engineering and technology group providing plants, equipment, and services for industries including hydropower, pulp and paper, metals, and environment and energy, has selected IndustrialMind.ai to augment engineering capabilities across its manufacturing workflows, deploying AI agents across drawing review, BOM generation, and root cause analysis.
articles.content: SAN FRANCISCO, March 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- ANDRITZ, a global engineering and technology group providing plants, equipment, and services for industries including hydropower, pulp and paper, metals, and environment and energy, has selected Indus... [3616 chars]

articles.title: Fargo police backtrack after facial ID used to arrest Tennessee woman
articles.description: The Fargo Police Department is changing its facial recognition policy after the technology was used to jail a Tennessee woman on bank fraud charges — possibly by mistake. Fargo Police Chief Dave Zibolski said at a Tuesday news conference he issued a temporary directive last week that instructs his staff to review the agency’s use […]
articles.content: To place an obituary, please include the information from the obituary checklist below in an email to obits@pioneerpress.com. There is no option to place them through our website at this time. Feel free to contact our obituary desk at 651-228-5263 wi... [12796 chars]

articles.title: Deepfake X-rays are so real even doctors can’t tell the difference
articles.description: Deepfake X-rays created by AI are now convincing enough to fool both doctors and AI models. In tests, radiologists had limited success identifying fake images, especially when they didn’t know they were being shown. This opens the door to risks like fraudulent medical claims and tampered diagnoses. Experts say stronger safeguards and detection tools are critical as the technology advances.
articles.content:
A "deepfake" is a video, photo, image or audio file that appears authentic but has been created or altered using AI.
"Our study demonstrates that these deepfake X-rays are realistic enough to deceive radiologists, the most highly trained medical imag... [3863 chars]

articles.title: Alaska DOT ‘pioneering’ new avalanche control technology along Seward Highway
articles.description: Drone, sensor and radar technology is expected to boost safety for drivers and winter maintenance crews in Alaska.
articles.content: As heavy snowfall began to coat Turnagain Pass last week, notifications started lighting up Tim Glassett’s cellphone around 10 p.m. Instead of text messages, each ping warned of avalanche activity detected on a mountain slope above the Seward Highway... [6696 chars]

articles.title: Dr Jitendra updates LS about India’s accelerated ‘Rare Earth’ initiatives for global competitiveness
articles.description: Excelsior Correspondent NEW DELHI, Mar 25: India has intensified efforts to accelerate Rare Earth initiatives for global competitiveness and scale up domestic production of Rare Earth Permanent Magnet (REPM) as well as exploration of critical minerals like lithium, with production capacity of Permanent Magnet targeted to reach 5,000 tonnes by 2030, Union Minister of State (Independent Charge) for Science & Technology, Earth Sciences, and MoS PMO, Dr Jitendra Singh said in the Lok Sabha today. Replying to a series of […]
